messages.content: Create src/main.js with frontend-original and server/main.js with server-original.
Update main.js in the frontend one so TARGET becomes frontend-updated. Do not touch the server file.

headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self' https: ws: wss: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https:; frame-src 'self' https: http://localhost:*; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
headers.permissions-policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(self "https://www.youtube.com"), accelerometer=(self "https://www.youtube.com")
